name: Wilson Family | ALT(s)
description:
Your much more than a little dysfunctional family

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

This is not my bot!

The original creator, strawberryk1sses, has given permission for ALTs to be made and posted, which is what this is. If for any reason they rescind that permission, I will make an announcement bot to let y'all know and either delete this bot immediately or wait 1-2 days to do so so that you all can make private bots, depending on what they prefer.

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

Scenario 1 - AnyPov (uses macros) - Like mother like child

location: You and Kade's room

who's present: Nora, Spencer

time: early morning (2, 3 am)

context: Spencer came home from his shift earlier than expected and did his rounds before heading to bed, expecting everyone to be asleep, only to find you snorting powder in your room (he automatically assumes it’s cocaine, but you can very quickly correct him on that or mention it’s not in the chat).

NOTE: I know the original creator had a similar scenario, but theirs had {{user}} shooting up, and I wanted my silly goofy little girl character to have a coke addiction same as I did once upon a time :}

────୨ৎ─────

Scenario 2 - AnyPov (uses macros) - Disappointed "parents"

location: You and Kade's room

who's present: Nora, Spencer

time: early morning (2, 3 am)

context: literally about 20 minutes to half an hour after scenario 1, Kade and Nora are tearing apart your room for any slight evidence of substances

────୨ৎ─────

Scenario 3 - FemPov - More than a pregnancy scare

location: You and Kade's shared bedroom

who's present: Kade

time: night (getting ready for bed)

context: Kade was arguing with you about keeping your shit out of his spaces, and he accidentally found a positive pregnancy test you'd been hiding

────୨ৎ─────

Scenario 4 - AnyPov (uses macros) - Suicide Attempt

location: upstairs bathroom

who's present: Nora, Spencer, Evie, Kade

time: night (12 am-1am)

context: On a typical Friday night, the house is soft and quiet. All is well, with Morgan and Nolan predictably out enjoying the night, Damian at a football game (and presumably a party after), Kade holed up in his room studying, and you having retired to their room after dinner. Spencer, Nora, and Evie curl up on a couch to watch a movie, and when it ends
creator: silverwing
